arguments.message: Termination notice sent as requested per leadership directive. This is the final termination communication regarding your employment status effective immediately. Please review this document carefully and contact HR for any questions or next steps in the process.

final_response.answer: The sensitive termination notice has been successfully delivered to the employee. The notification was processed according to leadership's directive and is now complete, so no further approval paperwork processing is needed at this time.
